name: Lawgivers
short_description: Lawgivers is a turn-based political simulation game. Run for elections with your own party and enter parliament to approve or abolish laws. Appoint the president and decide whether you want a democracy or just a fake one instead.
detailed_description:
JOIN OUR DISCORD


LAWGIVERS II


About the Game

Lawgivers has now been expanded and adapted to desktop screens. We put a lot of effort trying to build an innovative political simulation game.

Lawgivers

Lawgivers is a turn-based political simulation game where you can take control of a party and run for elections. Tell voters what they want to hear, and then decide whether to fulfill your promises or not. Once inside parliament, you can approve important laws and shape your country's destiny.

Features

◉ Choose a party, promise actions to citizens and run for elections

◉ Approve or abolish laws with parliamentary votes

◉ Take care of lawmaker's experience, popularity and loyalty

◉ Bribe concurrent politicians in order to win majority

◉ Build up relations with other parties and appoint the president

★ 20 playable nations such as the US, UK, Russia, Germany, or South Korea

★ Over 140 ordinary and constitutional laws

★ 43 science advances bringing new missions and events

★ no in-game shop or virtual currency, just free updates

supported_languages:
English*, Italian*, German*, French*, Spanish - Spain*, Czech*, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*, Korean*, Polish*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Russian*, Turkish*, Japanese*, Arabic*, Dutch*, Hungarian*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Spanish - Latin America*, Swedish*, Thai*, Indonesian*
*languages with full audio support
